title: Medical Emergency — No EMS
description: EMS is unavailable or hours away. This sequence maximizes survival for a severe trauma patient.

steps.title: Scene Safety
steps.summary: Ensure the threat that caused injury is neutralized

steps.title: Triage (START)
steps.summary: If multiple patients: sort by severity before treating

steps.title: Hemorrhage Control
steps.summary: Stop life-threatening bleeding — M in MARCH
checklistItems: Tourniquet applied if extremity arterial bleed
Wound packed if junctional or torso

steps.title: Airway Management
steps.summary: Ensure patent airway — A in MARCH
checklistItems: Recovery position if unconscious and breathing
NPA inserted if available and trained

steps.title: Shock Management
steps.summary: Treat hemorrhagic shock — C in MARCH

steps.title: Patient Monitoring
steps.summary: Reassess every 5 minutes until help arrives
